text:
AOTF-s2 is the 22nd track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 17th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AOTF-s2" is an abbreviation of "Attack on Titan Final Season 2".

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of the 1st part (0:00-2:17) of 進撃st-hrn-egt20130629巨人.

All occurrences

Episode 65 - Mikasa arrives to save Eren from the War Hammer Titan
